caption: In an indoor banquet hall with recessed ceiling lighting and chandeliers, several people are engaged in a synchronized activity on a blue carpeted floor. A man in the foreground, wearing a bright yellow traditional two-piece outfit, holds a long, thin pole or rope diagonally across his body. Behind him, another person in a blue traditional outfit stands poised, and a third person in a blue outfit is visible further back. In the background, a crowd of spectators is seated at tables. As the scene progresses, the man in yellow lowers the pole from a high position, bringing it down across his torso. Simultaneously, the person in blue behind him moves their arms in coordination with the man's motions. The spectators remain seated, watching the performance unfold in the center of the room.
